items.title: fix(tasks): allow reasoning effort for claude-fable-5 runs
items.author: tatoalo
items.body:
## Problem

Creating cloud task runs with `claude-fable-5` selected fails with a `400` from the run endpoint:

```
Reasoning effort 'high' is not supported for runtime_adapter 'claude' and model 'claude-fable-5'. Supported values: none.
```

The gateway now serves `claude-fable-5` but the ba

items.title: safishamsi/graphify
items.author: safishamsi
items.body: AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
